_comment: Release-only config overlay, merged onto tauri.conf.json via
the base config so that a plain `pnpm tauri build` (local dev, or any
build without the updater signing key) does NOT try to produce signed
HARD-FAIL when TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY is absent. The GitHub Actions
release workflow applies this overlay only after confirming the signing
secret is present, mirroring the no-op-when-absent ethos of
